tests.title: Export to the arxiv plugin yields a flattened, self-contained bundle that compiles with no system styles
errors: Error: arXiv bundle tarball never appeared at /tmp/pandoc-preview-proof-runs/20260619T223954Z/p122-arxiv-flatten/arxiv-bundle.tar.gz (result: {"success":false,"artifact":null,"exit_code":null,"stdout":"","stderr":"error: no plugin with id \"arxiv-export\" in the plugins dir"}). The generic plugin firewall did not discover/run the vendored arxiv-export plugin to produce a flattened self-contained bundle from the real buffer.
